creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226540
games/nbsdgames: update to 4.1.2

Update games/nbsdgames to 4.1.2.  This is a patch release that fixes some build problems with pre-C11 compilers (and should hopefully actually fix bug #257155).

Changelog: https://github.com/abakh/nbsdgames/releases/tag/v4.1.2

Unfortunately I am unable to test on PPC64 myself due to a lack of hardware and currently broken QEMU.  Tested on armv7 and arm64 with Poudriere.

Please MFC if possible and within policy.
